---
title: "SIR"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(devtools)
library(deSolve)
library(ggplot2)
devtools::load_all()
```

## Problem setup

SIR ODE:
$$\dot{S} = -\beta S I, \quad \dot{I} = \beta S I - \gamma I, \quad \dot{R} = \gamma I$$
True parameters $p^* = (\beta,\ \gamma) = (0.3,\ 0.1)$.

```{r data}
f <- function(u, p, t) c(
  -p[1] * u[1] * u[2],
   p[1] * u[1] * u[2] - p[2] * u[2],
   p[2] * u[2]
)

p_star  <- c(0.3, 0.1)
u0      <- c(0.99, 0.01, 0.0)
npoints <- 64
t_span  <- c(0, 60)
tt      <- matrix(seq(t_span[1], t_span[2], length.out = npoints), ncol = 1)

modelODE <- function(tvec, state, parms) list(as.vector(f(state, parms, tvec)))
sol      <- deSolve::ode(y = u0, times = tt, func = modelODE, parms = p_star)
U_true   <- sol[, 2:4]

set.seed(42)
nr       <- 0.25
U_vec    <- as.vector(U_true)
noise_sd <- nr * sqrt(mean(U_vec^2))
U_noisy  <- U_true + matrix(rnorm(npoints * 3, sd = noise_sd), nrow = npoints)

cat(sprintf("n = %d   nr = %.2f   σ = %.4f\n", npoints, nr, noise_sd))
```

## Noisy data

```{r plot-data}
df_data <- data.frame(
  t  = as.vector(tt),
  S_true  = U_true[, 1],  I_true  = U_true[, 2],  R_true  = U_true[, 3],
  S_noisy = U_noisy[, 1], I_noisy = U_noisy[, 2], R_noisy = U_noisy[, 3]
)

ggplot(df_data, aes(x = t)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = S_noisy), colour = "steelblue",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = I_noisy), colour = "firebrick",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(y = R_noisy), colour = "darkgreen",  size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = S_true,  colour = "S"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = I_true,  colour = "I"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = R_true,  colour = "R"), linewidth = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(S = "steelblue", I = "firebrick", R = "darkgreen")) +
  labs(title = sprintf("SIR — noisy observations (nr = %.2f, n = %d)", nr, npoints),
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion", colour = "Compartment") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Solve with WENDy ROOT

```{r solve, message=FALSE}
devtools::load_all()
res1 <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "ROOT")
res2 <- solveWendy(f, U_noisy, tt, method = "IRLS")

cat(sprintf("p*   = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", p_star),       collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("p̂_ROOT    = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", res1$phat),     collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("p̂_IRLS    = [%s]\n", paste(sprintf("%.4f", res2$phat),     collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("Relative Coefficient Error ROOT = %.4f\n", rel_err(res1$phat, p_star)))
cat(sprintf("Relative Coefficient Error IRLS = %.4f\n", rel_err(res2$phat, p_star)))
```
